title: Friend Creeper
description: Tame Creepers and make them your friend.
body:
# Friend Creeper

This mod allows you to tame Creepers and make them your friends. Use gunpowder to tame a Creeper — once tamed, it will wear a poppy on its head to show it's your friend!

Once tamed, your Friend Creeper will follow you and fight back against whatever is targeting you.

You can also make your Friend Creeper sit down to prevent it from moving or retaliating.

Most options can be adjusted in the config file. Installing Cloth Config API allows you to tweak settings directly from within Mod Menu.

## Dependencies
- Fabric API
